comment.body:
For anyone who is new to Alma's Substack, the limitations of the Substack app leads to a lot of confusion. My 2 cents on how to approach using Alma's Substack is below.... pro tip is to BOOKMARK the links in your browser:

** Review each Weekly Post every Monday, and perhaps even review the past ones multiple times for more context (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/market-analysis?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=menu)
** Review each Daily Post at beginning of the day (same link as above)

** Have two windows open for Chats everyday:
---- New Daily Chat set up each day 
---- Trading Signals Chat (Alma provides trading signals occasionally; set up on February 3 soon after Alma opened up the Substack; link is https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/5ec8d5aa-9fac-4e6d-aef1-3f6a28632ae4)

** Educate yourselves with these chats and posts by reading through them, maybe even more than once:
---- Ongoing Q&A Chat (set up on February 26; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/398075ab-2aac-41d1-bf37-8fda43ccf9aa) 
---- Options Depth Heat Map Overview (set up on February 5; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/2aab643b-d095-4c00-8b42-4f35379fb002)
---- Educational Posts (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/educational-posts) 

Every so often I will copy and re-paste this post into chats when new folks jump in. Hope this helps!!!
